executive_summary: Build failure detected across 3 attempts due to GitHub Actions workflow dispatch failure. Root cause: HTTP 500 Internal Server Error when attempting to trigger .github/workflows/build.yml workflow. This is a critical configuration issue preventing any build execution.

errors.error_message: HTTP Error 500: Internal Server Error. Failed to run workflow dispatch
errors.location: GitHub Actions API - Workflow Dispatch Endpoint
root_cause_analysis: GitHub Actions workflow file (.github/workflows/build.yml) may not exist in the repository
Workflow file may have syntax errors preventing dispatch
Repository may lack proper GitHub Actions permissions or tokens
Workflow may not have workflow_dispatch trigger configured
GitHub API service may be experiencing temporary issues
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline blockage - no builds can be executed until workflow dispatch is fixed

automated_fix_recommendations.implementation: Create a valid GitHub Actions workflow file with workflow_dispatch trigger in .github/workflows/ directory
automated_fix_recommendations.validation: Verify file exists and has correct YAML syntax
automated_fix_recommendations.rollback_plan: Remove workflow file if it causes additional issues

automated_fix_recommendations.action: Add workflow_dispatch trigger to existing workflow
automated_fix_recommendations.implementation: Ensure the workflow file contains 'on: workflow_dispatch:' trigger
automated_fix_recommendations.validation: Test workflow dispatch via GitHub UI or API

automated_fix_recommendations.action: Verify GitHub Actions permissions and tokens
automated_fix_recommendations.implementation: Check repository settings for Actions permissions, verify GITHUB_TOKEN has workflow dispatch permissions
automated_fix_recommendations.validation: Test API call with proper authentication

automated_fix_recommendations.action: Implement retry logic with exponential backoff
automated_fix_recommendations.implementation: Add retry mechanism for transient GitHub API failures
automated_fix_recommendations.rollback_plan: Remove retry logic if it causes delays

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Error detected in build_failure_attempt-1.json, build_failure_attempt-2.json, build_failure_attempt-3.json
compliance_notes.security_impact: Low - No security vulnerabilities detected, configuration issue only
compliance_notes.regulatory_compliance: No compliance violations - standard CI/CD configuration issue
compliance_notes.change_management: Requires approval for workflow file creation/modification in main branch

troubleshooting_steps: 3. If exists, verify YAML syntax and workflow_dispatch trigger
4. If not exists, create workflow file with proper structure
5. Verify repository Actions settings are enabled
6. Check GitHub Actions permissions in repository settings
7. Test workflow dispatch manually via GitHub UI
8. Review GitHub Actions logs for additional error details

summary.recommended_next_action: Create or fix .github/workflows/build.yml file with workflow_dispatch trigger (FIX-001-A or FIX-001-B)
summary.automation_confidence: HIGH - Clear configuration issue with known solutions
